category_sources: source_facts.description: Command-line utility for taking VNC snapshots.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vncsnapshot; official SourceForge project page displays the project name as VNCSnapshot.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project links to the VNCSnapshot Web Site, which is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page includes a Code section for VNCSnapshot source control.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies VNC snapshots; official SourceForge summary says it takes snapshots from a VNC server and saves JPEG files.
